decks.notes: The deck revolves around utilizing the Aluren enchantment to cast creatures for free, primarily Acererak the Archlich and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. By combining this with cards like Show and Tell and Omniscience, the deck aims to quickly assemble a powerful board state and overwhelm the opponent with its combo potential. The deck runs a suite of cantrips and mana acceleration to ensure consistency and speed in executing its game plan, while also including disruption in the form of Force of Will to protect its key pieces.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while applying pressure through aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent. It utilizes cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will to control the board and protect its threats. The deck also includes disruptive lands like Wasteland and efficient card draw spells like Brainstorm to maintain its tempo advantage. Overall, the deck aims to quickly establish a dominant board presence and control the game through disruption and aggression.

The deck focuses on using lands to control the game, with cards like Dark Depths, Wasteland, and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale. It also utilizes cards like Life from the Loam and Exploration to generate value from lands. The deck includes ways to search for key lands like Thespian's Stage and Bojuka Bog, as well as disruption with Pithing Needle and Karakas. It aims to create strong board presence with cards like Urza's Saga and Boseiju, Who Endures, while also having control elements like Maze of Ith and Grafdigger's Cage.

This deck aims to quickly put powerful creatures into play by utilizing Sneak Attack and Show and Tell. Atraxa, Grand Unifier can be cheated into play along with Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Archon of Cruelty to quickly end the game. Stock Up helps dig for combo pieces, while Brainstorm and Ponder provide additional card selection. Control elements such as Spell Pierce and Force of Will protect the combo. The deck also includes ramp with Lotus Petal and fast mana sources like Simian Spirit Guide. The mana base supports the deck's plan for explosive plays.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to put pressure on the opponent while also hindering their game plan. It utilizes cards like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's board and hand, while also using Aether Vial to cheat creatures into play quickly. The deck also includes graveyard hate with cards like Faerie Macabre to disrupt strategies that rely on the graveyard. Overall, it aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while applying pressure with its aggressive creatures.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan using cards like Thoughtseize and Daze while applying pressure with efficient threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent. It also takes advantage of the card advantage provided by cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Wasteland while maintaining a steady tempo advantage. It utilizes a blend of disruptive and aggressive elements to outpace opponents and secure victories in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively utilize powerful creatures and disruptive spells to control the board and apply pressure on the opponent. With a mix of efficient removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and disruption tools like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy, paired with strong creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Karakas provide additional utility and disruption options to further solidify the deck's game plan.

The deck is focused on quickly comboing off by milling your entire library and then winning with Thassa's Oracle or Undercity Informer triggering the win condition. The key strategy involves utilizing cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer to quickly mill yourself, while using spells like Reanimate to bring back key combo pieces. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Cabal Therapy and Pact of Negation to protect your combo. The goal is to win as quickly as possible, before your opponent has a chance to stop you.

The deck focuses on tempo and aggression, utilizing disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Daze to control the game while deploying threats like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters to pressure the opponent. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and utility, while Wasteland and Force of Will help disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to efficiently disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining a steady stream of threats to close out the game quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to establish a lock on the game using artifacts and control elements. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere, Karn, the Great Creator, and Planar Nexus, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and limit their options. The presence of powerful artifacts like Candelabra of Tawnos and Grim Monolith help generate mana efficiently to cast big threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The combination of resource denial, control elements, and powerful threats make this deck a formidable force in a Legacy format 1 vs 1 environment.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize aggressive creatures like Cori-Steel Cutter, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Delver of Secrets to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck also focuses on disruption and control elements such as Lightning Bolt, Force of Will, Daze, and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck includes card draw and manipulation spells like Ponder, Brainstorm, and Mishra's Bauble to maintain consistency and find key cards. The inclusion of Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower provides additional threats and versatility to adapt to different situations.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively disrupt the opponent's strategy while building a strong board presence. This is achieved through a combination of hand disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy, efficient creatures such as Voice of Victory and Amped Raptor, and powerful removal spells like Swords to Plowshares. Additionally, the deck utilizes sacrifice outlets like Goblin Bombardment to control the board and finish off the opponent. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy with fetch lands and dual lands for consistent color fixing.

The deck focuses on utilizing lands synergies to control the game and disrupt the opponent's resources. By using cards like Crop Rotation, Life from the Loam, and Exploration, the deck aims to quickly assemble powerful land combos such as Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage or Urza's Saga and Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth. With additional disruption through cards like Malevolent Rumble and Sphere of Resistance, the deck aims to slow down the opponent while setting up its own win conditions through land interactions.

The deck aims to quickly and efficiently cheat big creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier into play using cards like Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Omniscience. It also includes disruption spells like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect the combo. The deck can generate a lot of mana with cards like Ancient Tomb and Lotus Petal, allowing for explosive plays. The addition of Yggdrasil, Rebirth Engine and Stock Up provide additional value and flexibility to the deck's game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling a combo of cards that allows for a win condition with minimal setup. By utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Simian Spirit Guide, and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to cast spells quickly and efficiently to empty the entire library, enabling a win with Thassa's Oracle or Pact of Negation. Duress and Thoughtseize provide disruption for the opponent's game plan, while Undercity Informer and Balustrade Spy serve as key combo pieces to achieve victory. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful and fast combo strategy.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing lands to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up powerful combos with cards like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage. It includes a mix of land destruction, ramp, and recursion to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent. Additionally, it includes tools like Boseiju, Who Endures and Pithing Needle to protect its key pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to outlast the opponent and overwhelm them with powerful land synergies and disruption tools.
